progress_summary: v1.8.0 'Documentation & repo hygiene' release cut on branch claude/release-v1-8 (worktree off origin/main). Shipped in this cut: every-PR mesh wiring in skills/orchestrator.md (+ sync-bundles across 29 skills), SKILL.md description updates (oc-git-ops, oc-bug-check, oc-release-ops), lockstep bump 1.7.0 -> 1.8.0 (27 skills; docs-forge/repo-ops already 1.8.0), changelog swap (v1.8 Coming Next -> Just Released hero, v1.9 vote moved to Coming Next), homepage release bar + stat + Header chip + Skill Library callout -> v1.8, styleguide badge v1.8.0, server.json 1.8.0, skills/CHANGELOG.md [1.8.0] entry, two blog posts published (release post + engineering deep-dive) with OG cards, release-surface guard tests updated to v1.8. Gates: vitest 448/448 PASS, astro check 0 errors, site build 76 pages, gen-catalog 29 skills, sync-bundles:check clean, release-surfaces test PASS. Remaining: PR -> CI -> merge, tag v1.8.0 (publish-mcp-registry workflow), manual staging + prod deploy (deploys are manual by doctrine), close deploy-lag issue.

key_decisions: Semver v1.8.0 minor, theme 'Documentation & repo hygiene' from the changelog Coming Next card.
Both 2026-07-10 blog posts publish with the release PR (draft flags removed) rather than via the flip bot.
Coming Next panel now hosts the v1.9 distribution theme vote; Planned keeps v1.10/v1.11.
server.json bumped to 1.8.0 in the PR; the v1.8.0 tag re-syncs and publishes to the MCP registry.
PM release ticket deferred: Linear MCP unauthenticated in this session (pm_deferred_actions).

next_actions: Merge the release PR on green CI, then tag v1.8.0 on the merge commit.
From main: npm run deploy:staging, eyeball staging.opchain.dev (/blog, /changelog, /skills), then npm run deploy.
Flush pm_deferred_actions via /oc-release announce --retry-pm once Linear MCP is authenticated.
